violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

Self-serve baked goods, sandwiches, and chorizo breakfast super slices packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Self-serve food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Per person in charge, establishment has ingredient information. Establishment made a sign notifying customers to inquire about label information during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
